# PERF-058 positive: c.Request.Body read without deferring Close
lang: go
file: PERF-058-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Upload(c *gin.Context) {
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
	_ = body
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
